docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SPRUELL, KWANMA BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM KETTY JONES

PLAINTIFF KWANMA SPRUELL'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE ORDER DISMISSING CASE ISSUED ON 2/10/2009 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. ORDER DISMISSING CASE IS ORDERED VACATED. ORDER SIGNED. COURT ORDERED AN OSC RE: DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SCHEDULED ON 7/21/2009 AT 10;00 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 212. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: HELEN SOREP-MATLEY, CSR# 9225. (212)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2009 Off Calendar

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jun-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Cory Birnbert, Esq. for Petitioner: Ketty Jones, present as Guardian ad litem for: Kwanma Spruell, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $5,709.92
Medical Expenses $6,650.58
Costs $$4,660.34
A net balance of $10,479.16 to be deposited into a blocked account with US Bank, 4947 Third Street, San Francisco, CA. 94124, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar May-26-2009 Continued To Jun-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.

Rachel S. Gendell, Esq. appeared with petitioner Ketty Jones, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minor Kwanma Spruell, who was not present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

The minor's medical records pertaining to the incident in question were not provided to the Court. Accordingly, and good cause appearing, this matter is continued to June 2, 2009 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218 for further hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.

Ntc And Mtn To Set Aside The Order Dismissing Case
Off Calendar Apr-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Kwanma Spruell's Motion to Set Aside The Order dismissing Case issued on 2/10/2009 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Order Dismissing Case is ordered vacated. Order signed. Court ordered an OSC re: dismissal pursuant to CRC 3.1385 scheduled on 7/21/2009 at 10;00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR# 9225. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR# 7782. (212)
